title: Sweet Smoky Argentinian Korean Pear Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Argentinian dish featuring Korean pear, grilled to perfection with a sweet and smoky flavor, perfect for a snack or dessert. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for all tastes.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat, about 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together brown sugar, smoked paprika, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the Korean pear cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the sugar mixture.
Thread 4 pear cubes onto each bamboo skewer.
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pears are caramelized and slightly charred.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving to kids.
You can also serve with a dollop of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream for extra sweetness.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
